requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS) and MEPS registration
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标识计划（MELS）与MEPS注册
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標籤計劃（MELS）與MEPS登記

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Singapore are subject to the Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme and minimum-energy-performance requirements under the NEA energy-efficiency framework for regulated household goods. The Singapore target is model-level compliance against local threshold and label format requirements before sale, including clear energy-efficiency declaration on the label and related documentation.
summary.zh: 新加坡新销售的家用电冰箱在NEA能效框架下属于受管制家电，需要符合强制能效标识计划（MELS）和最低能效标准（MEPS）要求。进入市场前需按新加坡模型标准完成能效合规判定，并在标签及技术资料中作出清晰标注。
summary.zht: 新加坡新銷售的家用電冰箱在NEA能效框架下屬於受管制家電，需要符合強制能效標識計劃（MELS）和最低能效標準（MEPS）要求。進入市場前需按新加坡型號標準完成能效合規判定，並在標籤及技術資料中作清楚標註。

standards_or_laws: NEA Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS) and Minimum Energy Performance Standards for household appliances
Singapore domestic-market technical filing format and product data requirements tied to regulated goods listings

summary.en: China requires energy label disclosure and minimum performance under China Energy Label and GB 12021.2 for household refrigerators, but the Singapore MELS format and administrative filing process are separate. Chinese labels use the national Chinese regime and are not the same legal instrument as Singapore MELS.
summary.zh: 中国有《能源效率标识》及GB 12021.2对家用电冰箱的能效标签和最小能效等级要求，但新加坡MELS属于独立的格式和行政申报体系。中国中文能效标识制度与新加坡MELS不是同一法定文件。
summary.zht: 中國有《能源效率標識》及GB 12021.2對家用電冰箱的能效標籤和最小能效等級要求，但新加坡MELS屬獨立的格式和行政申報體系。中國中文能效標識制度與新加坡MELS不是同一法定文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Household refrigerators minimum energy performance and labelling method
China Energy Label measures managed by NDRC/SAMR

gap.en: Chinese MELS-equivalent labels cannot be reused for Singapore market placement. The Singapore filing and data package are model-specific and must satisfy Singapore thresholds and label structure. Any mismatch in declared electricity-consumption baseline, test report set, or model declaration leads to a practical market-entry delay even when China has valid labelling.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不适用于新加坡市场投放。新加坡备案与资料包是型号专属且须符合新加坡门槛和标识结构。若声明耗能基准、检测报告或型号声明不匹配，即使中国标签有效也会造成实际准入延迟。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不適用於新加坡市場投放。新加坡備案與資料包是型號專屬且必須符合新加坡門檻和標識結構。若聲明耗能基準、測試報告或型號聲明不匹配，即使中國標籤有效也會造成實際准入延遲。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MELS/MEPS compliance and Singapore-compliant labeling is required before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China energy label under GB 12021.2 and related national rules is mandatory before domestic sale

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Energy is a mandatory Singapore market gate for refrigerators under MELS and MEPS. A China-compliant product must be re-documented under Singapore's own listing, threshold, and label structure before shipment into Singapore.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MELS/MEPS对新加坡市场的冰箱属于强制性门槛。中国合规产品必须按新加坡自身目录、阈值和标识结构重建文件后方可投放新加坡。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MELS/MEPS對新加坡市場的冰箱屬於強制性門檻。中國合規產品必須按新加坡自身目錄、閾值和標識結構重建文件後方可投放新加坡。

requirement_topic.en: Grid and power-rating alignment for Singapore entry
requirement_topic.zh: 新加坡进网供电与额定参数对齐
requirement_topic.zht: 新加坡進網供電與額定參數對齊

summary.en: Singapore supply is 230 V, 50 Hz for households. Export models targeted to Singapore should be rated and documented for local voltage/frequency behavior and should indicate any auto-selection or adapter requirements clearly in technical documentation so customs and safety teams can verify suitability.
summary.zh: 新加坡家用供电为230V、50Hz。面向新加坡的出口型号应在技术资料中明确标识电压频率适配能力及可能的自适应方案，以便新加坡监管与安全核验进口型号。
summary.zht: 新加坡家用供電為230V、50Hz。面向新加坡的出口型號應在技術資料中明確標識電壓頻率適配能力及可能的自適應方案，以便新加坡監管與安全核驗進口型號。

standards_or_laws: Singapore appliance market listing and energy declarations for regulated appliances under NEA supervision
Electrical ratings shown on importer and manufacturer technical documentation

summary.en: China commonly uses 220 V and 380 V/50 Hz system assumptions in domestic documentation depending on product model and market segment. The Chinese baseline does not automatically map to Singapore's model-level import suitability documentation.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常按220V及380V/50Hz系统假设区分不同型号和应用场景。中国基础参数并非自动等同于新加坡市场机型级适配文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常按220V及380V/50Hz系統假設區分不同型號和應用場景。中國基礎參數並非自動等同於新加坡市場機型級適配文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB product design and marking practices embedded in GB 4706.13 and supporting declarations
Chinese export technical documents prepared for domestic or regional sale

gap.en: The practical action for exporters is not a new technical redesign in every case but documentation alignment: confirm supply-frequency compatibility for Singapore, include explicit Singapore electrical rating in manuals, and verify the model will perform safely at 230 V 50 Hz. Models documented only for 220 V and sold without adaptation evidence may face a Singapore clearance follow-up request.
gap.zh: 对出口商的实际影响通常是资料对齐而非必然换机型。需确认230V 50Hz适配性、在使用说明中明确新加坡额定参数，并验证模型在该条件下运行安全。仅按220V说明且无适配证据的型号可能在新加坡清关前被补资料。
gap.zht: 對出口商的實際影響通常是資料對齊而非必然換機型。需確認230V 50Hz適配性、在使用說明中明確新加坡額定參數，並驗證型號在該條件下運行安全。僅按220V說明且無適配證據的型號可能在新加坡清關前被補資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Singapore-facing product documentation should show correct electrical rating and adaptation notes before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China domestic documentation must still match Chinese safety and electrical rules but does not replace Singapore-facing technical declaration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore-focused energy and regulated-good handling usually requires explicit model documentation alignment to 230 V, 50 Hz assumptions. Chinese domestic filings are a useful baseline but are not sufficient as the Singapore technical declaration on their own.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡相关能效与受管制设备处理通常要求模型文件明确符合230V、50Hz的适配假设。中国国内提交文件是有用基础，但不能单独替代新加坡技术声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡相關能效與受管制設備處理通常要求模型文件明確符合230V、50Hz的適配假設。中國國內提交文件是有用基礎，但不能單獨替代新加坡技術聲明。
